headline: Has Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Pullback Created A Fresh Opportunity For Investors?
summary: If you are wondering whether Sherwin-Williams at around US$296 per share is starting to look attractively priced, the valuation picture is more nuanced than the headline price suggests. The stock has retreated recently, with the share price down 4.3% over the past week, 4.5% over the past month, 9.6% year to date and 17.4% over the last year, even though the 3 year and 5 year returns stand at 26.5% and 12.0% respectively. Recent coverage has focused on how established industrials like...

headline: UBS Lowers Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Target as Housing Headwinds Persist
summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) is included among the 10 No-Brainer Dividend Stocks to Buy. On June 2, UBS downgraded The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) from Buy to Neutral. It also lowered its price target on the stock to $330 from $385. According to the firm, the company’s earnings remain closely tied to a recovery in the […]

summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading mixed after the AI/Datacenter/Storage/Technology rally took a day off on Wednesday. headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on Sherwin-Williams, Lowers Price Target to $355
summary: BMO Capital  analyst John McNulty   maintains Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $420 to $355.
